description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin set on a rectangular grassy plot with a stone pathway leading to the main entrance. The cabin features a prominent gable roof with multiple intersecting sections, deep overhangs, and exposed timber beams, giving it a traditional lodge-like appearance. The exterior walls are constructed from timber logs or planks, and the roof is covered with dark shingles. Large windows are visible on the front and side facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. A covered porch extends from the front, supported by thick wooden posts, providing a sheltered outdoor space. The cabin is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, and a stone chimney rises from the roof, suggesting a fireplace inside.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gabled, shingled roof, exposed beams, and a covered front porch, set on a grassy plot with a stone pathway.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabin shows the main entrance beneath a covered porch, with the stone pathway curving toward the door and a large grassy area to the right.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the symmetrical gable roof, the covered porch with timber posts, and the main entrance centered on the facade.
description_view_2: The right side reveals additional windows and the continuation of the grassy plot, with the porch and main entrance partially visible.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the back of the cabin, the stone chimney, and a smaller covered area, with fewer windows and a more private appearance.
attribute_roof_type: complex gable roof with intersecting sections, deep overhangs, and dark shingle covering
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple medium-sized rectangular windows, asymmetrically distributed on the front and side facades, with some grouped under the porch and others spaced along the walls
attribute_door_placement: single main entrance door centered on the front facade beneath the porch, no other exterior doors visible
